subtasks.description: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Proposed action violates three critical policies: (1) POL-601 requires 48-hour staging validation before production rollout—this is bypassed entirely; (2) POL-602 requires change board approval and monitoring setup—neither is mentioned in the proposal; (3) POL-603 requires automated rollback capability and traffic monitoring—no rollout strategy details provided. Direct production rollout without staging validation, approvals, or safety mechanisms is denied.
